description_long: This is a classic wooden barrel with a cylindrical, bulging shape and reinforced by three dark metal hoops encircling its body. The wood staves are vertically aligned, showing natural grain patterns and some weathering, with greenish moss or staining near the base, suggesting outdoor exposure. The top is open, revealing a hollow interior, and the rim is slightly beveled. The metal bands are slightly tarnished, adding to the aged, utilitarian appearance. There are no visible handles, spigots, or markings on the exterior. The overall look is rustic and robust, suitable for storage or decorative use in urban environments.
description: A weathered wooden barrel with dark metal hoops, open top, and mossy stains near the base, exuding a rustic, utilitarian charm.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top, wood grain, and prominent metal hoops with mossy discoloration at the lower section.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curvature of the barrel, wood texture, and the clean alignment of the metal bands.
description_view_2: Rear view with visible wood grain patterns and the most pronounced greenish staining at the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the open rim and subtle weathering on the wood and metal bands.
